cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Bob is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are a bunch of partner swaps, so I need to track each one step by step. Let me start by writing down the initial pairings to keep track. Initially: - Alice is with Lola. - Bob is with Karl. - Claire is with Patrick. - Dave is with Sam. - Eve is with Helga. Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go through each one carefully. First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam, and Alice was with Lola. After swapping, Dave will be with Lola, and Alice will be with Sam. Let me update the pairings: After first swap: - Alice is now with Sam (previously Dave's partner). - Dave is now with Lola (previously Alice's partner). Others remain the same: - Bob with Karl - Claire with Patrick - Eve with Helga Second swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve was with Helga, and Alice is currently with Sam. So after swapping, Eve will take Sam, and Alice will take Helga. Let's update: After second swap: - Alice is now with Helga (previously Eve's partner). - Eve is now with Sam (previously Alice's partner). Others: - Bob with Karl - Claire with Patrick - Dave with Lola Third swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob was with Karl, Dave was with Lola. After swapping, Bob takes Lola, and Dave takes Karl. Updating: After third swap: - Bob is now with Lola (previously Dave's partner). - Dave is now with Karl (previously Bob's partner). Others: - Alice with Helga - Claire with Patrick - Eve with Sam Fourth swap: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob is currently with Lola, Eve is with Sam. After swapping, Bob takes Sam, and Eve takes Lola. Updating: After fourth swap: - Bob is now with Sam (previously Eve's partner). - Eve is now with Lola (previously Bob's partner). Others: - Alice with Helga - Claire with Patrick - Dave with Karl Fifth swap: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob is currently with Sam, Claire is with Patrick. After swapping, Bob takes Patrick, and Claire takes Sam. Updating: After fifth swap: - Bob is now with Patrick (previously Claire's partner). - Claire is now with Sam (previously Bob's partner). Others: - Alice with Helga - Dave with Karl - Eve with Lola Wait, but the question is asking who Bob is dancing with at the end. According to my last step, Bob is with Patrick. But looking at the options, Patrick is option (C). But let me check again because maybe I made a mistake. Let me retrace each step carefully. Initial pairings: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Helga First swap: Dave and Alice switch. So Dave takes Lola, Alice takes Sam. - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola Second swap: Eve and Alice switch. Eve takes Sam, Alice takes Helga. - Alice: Helga - Eve: Sam Third swap: Bob and Dave switch. Bob takes Lola, Dave takes Karl. - Bob: Lola - Dave: Karl Fourth swap: Bob and Eve switch. Bob takes Sam, Eve takes Lola. - Bob: Sam - Eve: Lola Fifth swap: Bob and Claire switch. Bob takes Patrick, Claire takes Sam. - Bob: Patrick - Claire: Sam So Bob ends up with Patrick, which is option (C). But wait, let me check again. The options are (A) Lola, (B) Karl, (C) Patrick, (D) Sam, (E) Helga. So according to this, the answer is (C) Patrick. But I want to make sure I didn't mix up any steps. Wait, but let me think again. Let me track each person's partner through each swap. Let me try another approach. Let's track each person's partner step by step. Starting with: - Alice: Lola - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Sam - Eve: Helga First swap: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave's new partner is Alice's old partner (Lola), and Alice's new partner is Dave's old partner (Sam). - Alice: Sam - Dave: Lola Others remain: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Helga Second swap: Eve and Alice switch partners. So Eve's new partner is Alice's current partner (Sam), and Alice's new partner is Eve's current partner (Helga). - Alice: Helga - Eve: Sam Others: - Bob: Karl - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Lola Third swap: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob's new partner is Dave's current partner (Lola), and Dave's new partner is Bob's current partner (Karl). - Bob: Lola - Dave: Karl Others: - Alice: Helga - Claire: Patrick - Eve: Sam Fourth swap: Bob and Eve switch partners. Bob's new partner is Eve's current partner (Sam), and Eve's new partner is Bob's current partner (Lola). - Bob: Sam - Eve: Lola Others: - Alice: Helga - Claire: Patrick - Dave: Karl Fifth swap: Bob and Claire switch partners. Bob's new partner is Claire's current partner (Patrick), and Claire's new partner is Bob's current partner (Sam). - Bob: Patrick - Claire: Sam Others: - Alice: Helga - Dave: Karl - Eve: Lola Yes, so at the end, Bob is with Patrick, which is option (C). So the answer should be (C) Patrick. But let me check once more because sometimes I might misread the swaps. Let's go step by step again: 1. Start: - Alice-Lola, Bob-Karl, Claire-Patrick, Dave-Sam, Eve-Helga 2. After Dave and Alice switch: - Alice-Sam, Dave-Lola, others same. 3. After Eve and Alice switch: - Alice-Helga, Eve-Sam, others same. 4. After Bob and Dave switch: - Bob-Lola, Dave-Karl, others same. 5.
